title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building multi-agent systems using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to automate M365 to Google Workspace migrations. The walkthrough covers multi-agent orchestration with SequentialAgent, self-correcting loops with LoopAgent, context caching, and deployment to Google's Agent Engine.
